name: Isramco Negev 2 Limited Partnership
summary: Isramco Negev 2 Limited Partnership engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and gas in Israel, Jordan, and Egypt. The company offers condensate, as well as natural gas. Its properties include the Tamar and Dalit reservoirs located in the Haifa coast; Daniel East and Daniel West situated in the northwest Ashdod; and Shimshon reservoir located in the west Ashkelon coast. It serves industrial customers, private electricity providers, and natural gas marketing companies, as well as the Israel Electric Company through its five oil assets. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Petah Tikva, Israel.
